addicted.name: Addicted
addicted.description: The character is hooked on a substance or behavior and suffers when deprived.
addicted.effect: Without a fix, suffer -2 to all rolls and lose 1 Willpower per scene of withdrawal; must spend Willpower to resist using.
addicted.resolution: Successfully complete a sustained recovery arc, or hit rock bottom in a scene.

blind.name: Blind
blind.description: The character cannot see (one or both eyes, temporary or permanent).
blind.effect: All visual Perception rolls fail; physical actions vs sighted foes suffer -3 (half-blind: -2).
blind.resolution: Regain sight via medicine or magic, or accept the loss permanently and take it as a character trait.

bonded.name: Bonded
bonded.description: The character is supernaturally or emotionally bonded to a specific person or entity.
bonded.effect: +2 to social rolls supporting the bonded party; -2 to act against their interests.
bonded.resolution: The bond is broken (death, betrayal, ritual).

broken.name: Broken
broken.description: The character has been emotionally shattered by trauma.
broken.effect: Lose 1 Willpower from any failed action against the trauma's source; cannot regain Willpower from low Virtue.
broken.resolution: Confront and overcome the source of trauma in a significant scene.

charmed.name: Charmed
charmed.description: The character is favorably disposed to a specific person.
charmed.effect: Cannot take hostile action against the charmer; suffers -2 to disbelieve their lies.
charmed.resolution: The charmer betrays the character, or the scene/effect ends.

competitive.name: Competitive
competitive.description: A specific rivalry has the character's full focus.
competitive.effect: +2 to actions taken directly against the rival in the current contest.
competitive.resolution: Win or lose the contest decisively.

confused.name: Confused
confused.description: The character cannot make sense of the situation.
confused.effect: -2 to Mental and Social rolls relying on clear thought; cannot benefit from teamwork.
confused.resolution: Step away from the source of confusion for a scene, or have the situation explained clearly.

connected.name: Connected
connected.description: The character has just made a useful inroad with a group or faction.
connected.effect: +2 to Social rolls with that faction for the duration.
connected.resolution: Use the connection on a significant roll (spends the Condition).

cowed.name: Cowed
cowed.description: The character has been intimidated into submission.
cowed.effect: Cannot take aggressive action against the intimidator while present; -2 to resist their further Social pressure.
cowed.resolution: The intimidator leaves the scene, or the character spends Willpower to defy them.

delusional.name: Delusional
delusional.description: The character believes something untrue with conviction.
delusional.effect: -2 to Mental rolls about the delusion's subject; may act on false premises.
delusional.resolution: Encounter incontrovertible proof in a dramatic scene.

demoralized.name: Demoralized
demoralized.description: The character has lost faith in a cause or themself.
demoralized.effect: Cannot spend Willpower on actions related to the cause.
demoralized.resolution: Re-affirm or abandon the cause through play.

deprived.name: Deprived
deprived.description: Lacking a normal need (food, sleep, vice).
deprived.effect: -1 to all rolls; cannot regain Willpower from the lacking source.
deprived.resolution: Acquire and indulge in the missing need.

disabled.name: Disabled
disabled.description: Lasting physical impairment (lost limb, chronic pain).
disabled.effect: Specific roll penalties tied to the disability (Storyteller sets).
disabled.resolution: Resolve once when the character incorporates it into identity, or is healed.

embarrassing-secret.name: Embarrassing Secret
embarrassing-secret.description: The character has something they desperately don't want known.
embarrassing-secret.effect: Anyone with the secret can leverage it (+2 to coerce or blackmail).
embarrassing-secret.resolution: The secret is exposed publicly, or rendered moot.

fugue.name: Fugue
fugue.description: The character periodically blacks out and acts out a buried compulsion.
fugue.effect: Lose narrative control to Storyteller during a fugue episode; no memory after.
fugue.resolution: Discover and address the underlying trauma.

guilty.name: Guilty
guilty.description: The character is wracked with guilt over a recent act.
guilty.effect: -2 to Resolve+Composure rolls; cannot regain Willpower from low Virtue this scene.
guilty.resolution: Confess, atone, or rationalize the act away in play.

hungry.name: Hungry
hungry.description: Needs a specific feeding (food, blood, essence, etc.).
hungry.effect: -1 to rolls; supernatural feeders may roll to resist frenzy.

inspired.name: Inspired
inspired.description: Struck by a flash of insight or creative drive.
inspired.effect: Spend to gain +2 dice on a single roll related to the inspiration.
inspired.resolution: Spend the bonus on a roll.

informed.name: Informed
informed.effect: Spend to add +2 dice to a single Mental or Investigation roll on the topic.
informed.resolution: Spend the bonus on a roll.

leveraged.name: Leveraged
leveraged.description: Someone has blackmail or coercive material on the character.
leveraged.effect: The leverager can compel a single action; refusing it costs Willpower.

lost.name: Lost
lost.description: The character is geographically or spiritually disoriented.
lost.effect: -2 to navigation, tracking, and orientation rolls.
lost.resolution: Reach a known landmark or have someone guide them out.

madness.name: Madness
madness.effect: Triggers under specific circumstances; imposes other Conditions or Willpower loss.
madness.resolution: Long-term therapy or quest arc, or accept as permanent.

mute.name: Mute
mute.effect: Cannot make rolls requiring speech; -3 to most Social.
mute.resolution: Cure (medical or magical) or fully adapt to alternate communication.

notoriety.name: Notoriety
notoriety.description: The character is publicly infamous for some deed.
notoriety.effect: -2 to Social rolls with people who know; +2 to Intimidation about the deed.
notoriety.resolution: Publicly redeem oneself, or the story is buried or forgotten.

obsession.name: Obsession
obsession.description: A specific subject dominates the character's thoughts.
obsession.effect: Must spend Willpower to focus on anything else for a scene.
obsession.resolution: Achieve the obsession's goal, or be forced to walk away in a dramatic scene.

shadow-soul.name: Shadow Soul
shadow-soul.description: The character carries a fragment of darkness or possessing presence.
shadow-soul.effect: Periodically must act on the shadow's urges or spend Willpower.
shadow-soul.resolution: Exorcism, integration, or destruction of the shadow.

shaken.name: Shaken
shaken.description: Recent fright has rattled the character.
shaken.effect: Lose 1 Willpower point if forced to confront the source again this scene.
shaken.resolution: Confront the source successfully, or flee the scene entirely.

spooked.name: Spooked
spooked.description: Brushed against the supernatural and unsettled by it.
spooked.effect: Choose: flee/avoid (no roll possible against source) or investigate (Beat when resolved).
spooked.resolution: Successfully investigate and rationalize the experience, or flee permanently.

steadfast.name: Steadfast
steadfast.effect: Spend to gain +2 dice on a roll resisting fear, doubt, or coercion.
steadfast.resolution: Spend the bonus on a roll.

stigmata.name: Stigmata
stigmata.description: The character bleeds from supernatural wounds at meaningful times.
stigmata.effect: Lose 1 lethal damage when the Condition triggers in a scene.

stumbled.name: Stumbled
stumbled.effect: -2 to the character's next relevant action.

stunned.name: Stunned
stunned.description: The character lost initiative to a blow or shock.
stunned.effect: Lose next instant action (or next turn in combat).

swooning.name: Swooning
swooning.description: The character is romantically or sexually fixated on someone.
swooning.effect: Cannot take direct hostile action against the target; -2 to resist their Social rolls.
swooning.resolution: The target spurns them, or the relationship is consummated or resolved.

wanton.name: Wanton
wanton.description: The character is in a state of reckless indulgence.
wanton.effect: +1 to actions taken in pursuit of indulgence; -2 to caution-based rolls (Stealth, Subterfuge).
wanton.resolution: Indulgence ends in consequence; scene closes.

guarded.name: Guarded
guarded.effect: +2 to resist Social maneuvering for the scene.
guarded.resolution: Resolve at end of scene, or when the character lowers their guard.

guilty-pleasure.name: Guilty Pleasure
guilty-pleasure.description: The character has indulged in a vice they feel ashamed of.
guilty-pleasure.effect: -1 to Resolve+Composure when the pleasure is referenced or tempted again.
guilty-pleasure.resolution: Either fully embrace or fully renounce the pleasure in play.

arm-wrack.name: Arm Wrack
arm-wrack.description: One arm is disabled by injury or restraint.
arm-wrack.effect: Cannot use two-handed actions with that arm; -2 to actions with the affected limb.
arm-wrack.resolution: Scene ends, or the arm is healed or freed.

beaten-down.name: Beaten Down
beaten-down.description: The character has been worked over and is reluctant to fight on.
beaten-down.effect: Must spend Willpower to take violent action.
beaten-down.resolution: Scene ends, or the character rests.

blinded.name: Blinded
blinded.description: The character cannot see for the scene (one or both eyes).
blinded.resolution: Scene ends, or sight is restored.

deafened.name: Deafened
deafened.description: The character cannot hear for the scene.
deafened.effect: -3 to hearing-based Perception; surprised more easily.
deafened.resolution: Scene ends, or hearing is restored.

drugged.name: Drugged
drugged.description: Under the influence of a chemical agent.
drugged.effect: -2 to Mental and Physical rolls; sleepy or euphoric per drug.
drugged.resolution: Scene ends, or the drug wears off.

insane.name: Insane
insane.effect: Storyteller takes control of the character briefly.
insane.resolution: Scene ends, or the break passes.

insensate.name: Insensate
insensate.description: Knocked out or otherwise unable to act.
insensate.effect: Cannot take actions until the Tilt ends.
insensate.resolution: Scene ends, or the character revives.

knocked-down.name: Knocked Down
knocked-down.effect: -2 to attack; close-combat attackers gain +2. Spend an action to stand.
knocked-down.resolution: Scene ends, or character spends an action to stand.

leg-wrack.name: Leg Wrack
leg-wrack.description: One leg is disabled by injury or restraint.
leg-wrack.effect: Speed halved; -2 to Physical rolls needing footing.
leg-wrack.resolution: Scene ends, or the leg is healed or freed.

poisoned.name: Poisoned
poisoned.description: Toxin is working in the character's system.
poisoned.effect: Lose Health per interval per toxicity.
poisoned.resolution: Scene ends, the toxin is purged, or antitoxin is applied.

sick.name: Sick
sick.resolution: Scene ends, or the character recovers.

stunned-tilt.name: Stunned
stunned-tilt.description: Lose next action (scene-bound Tilt counterpart to the Condition).
stunned-tilt.effect: Lose the next instant action or turn.
stunned-tilt.resolution: Scene ends, or the character acts again.

blizzard.name: Blizzard
blizzard.description: Heavy snow and wind reduce visibility and slow movement.
blizzard.effect: -3 to ranged attacks and Perception; movement halved.

earthquake.name: Earthquake
earthquake.resolution: Scene ends or the tremors stop.

extreme-cold.name: Extreme Cold
extreme-cold.effect: Lose Stamina-based resistance roll or take Bashing.
extreme-cold.resolution: Scene ends or the cold abates.

extreme-heat.name: Extreme Heat
extreme-heat.effect: As Extreme Cold but heat-based; dehydration imposes Deprived.
extreme-heat.resolution: Scene ends or the heat abates.

flooded.name: Flooded
flooded.description: Standing or rushing water covers the scene.
flooded.effect: Speed halved or swim rolls required.
flooded.resolution: Scene ends or the water recedes.

heavy-rain.name: Heavy Rain
heavy-rain.description: Driving rain reduces visibility and grip.
heavy-rain.effect: -2 to Perception and ranged attacks; surfaces slippery.
heavy-rain.resolution: Scene ends or the rain stops.

heavy-winds.name: Heavy Winds
heavy-winds.effect: -2 to ranged attacks; light objects become hazards.
heavy-winds.resolution: Scene ends or the wind dies down.

ice.name: Ice
ice.effect: Dexterity+Athletics to avoid Knocked Down on sudden moves.
ice.resolution: Scene ends or the ice melts.

darkness.name: Darkness
darkness.description: Heavy or total darkness covers the scene.
darkness.effect: -3 or auto-fail sight rolls; combat at penalty.
darkness.resolution: Scene ends or light is introduced.
